zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Clifton於1537年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴林頓時，他的父親William Clifton Esq.34歲，母親Elizabeth Blount34歲。他於1568年與Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle在英國英格蘭戴文巴普頓結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1593年4月在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴林頓享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Clifton was born in 1537, in Barrington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Clifton Esq., was 34 and his mother, Elizabeth Blount, was 34. He married Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle in 1568, in Bampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. He died in April 1593, in Barrington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Barrington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Clifton est né en 1537, à Barrington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Clifton Esq., avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Blount, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle en 1568, à Bampton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1593, à Barrington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Barrington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Clifton 1537 in Barrington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Clifton Esq. 34 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Blount 34. Er hat 1568 in Bampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im April 1593 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Barrington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Barrington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Clifton è nato il nel 1537 nel Barrington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Clifton Esq., aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Blount, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle nel 1568, nel Bampton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1593, nel Barrington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Barrington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Cliftonが1537年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトバーリントンで生まれた時，父William Clifton Esq.は34歳，母Elizabeth Blountは34歳であった。1568年にイギリスイギリスデボンバンプトンでAnne Stanley Baroness Monteagleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1593年4月にイギリスイギリスソメルセトバーリントンで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトバーリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Clifton(이)가 1537년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 배링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Clifton Esq.(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Blount(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1568년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 바프턴에서 Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1593년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 배링턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 배링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Clifton nasceu em 1537, em Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Clifton Esq., tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Blount, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle em 1568, em Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em abril de 1593, em Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Clifton родился в 1537 г. в местности баррингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Clifton Esq. было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Blount, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle в 1568 г. в местности бамптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер апрель 1593 г. в местности баррингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности баррингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Clifton nació en 1537, en Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Clifton Esq., tenía 34 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Blount, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle en 1568, en Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en abril de 1593, en Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
